# truenas_app (Data Source)

Provides information about a deployed app on TrueNAS SCALE.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "truenas_app" "plex" {
  id = "plex"
}

output "app_state" {
  value = data.truenas_app.plex.state
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The app ID (name) to look up.

### Read-Only

- `custom_app` (Boolean) Whether this is a user-defined custom app (docker compose).
- `human_version` (String) Human-readable version string.
- `latest_version` (String) Latest available version.
- `migrated` (Boolean) Whether this app has been migrated from an older catalog.
- `name` (String) The app name.
- `state` (String) Current state (RUNNING, STOPPED, DEPLOYING, etc.).
- `upgrade_available` (Boolean) Whether an upgrade is available.
- `version` (String) Installed chart version.
